title: Better Bookshelves
body:
Makes The Normal Bookshelf look Smother.
And the new chiseled bookshelf look more like Normal Bookshelves.


| ![Chiseled Bookshelves completely Empty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rzDBk64g/images/5634837ac5ecc1e634b4609eaf182da246fb2032.png)      | ![Chiseled Bookshelves completely Empty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rzDBk64g/images/32ef94fec824b93de69e12716b7dfa4dc258c19c.png)       |
| ------------- | ------------- |
| ![Mix of both Chiseled completely filled and Normal Bookshelves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rzDBk64g/images/db56ef972e75f4f2969976481a3012090edf27df.png) | ![Normal Bookshelves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rzDBk64g/images/a71a7e97bb7c53fe91c8dc94a3050a77c285377a.png) |
